criteria.description: Report page renders Workflow Fingerprints section iff ecosystem.workflow_fingerprints has at least one entry; hidden when empty/missing.
criteria.evidence: web/app.js::renderWorkflowFingerprints has defensive entry (Array.isArray check + length==0 -> section.hidden=true) and is wired into renderReport. web/index.html adds <section id="workflow-fingerprints" hidden>. Browser QA per quickstart.md verifies the visibility toggle on fixtures.

criteria.description: Each fingerprint row displays id, confidence, sources[] as labels, evidence_count, and active/installed indicators.
criteria.evidence: web/app.js::renderWorkflowFingerprints loops the array and creates DOM nodes for id (textContent), confidence span with class confidence-${fp.confidence}, sources <ul>/<li> badge row, evidence count span, and conditional active/installed spans. All values via textContent. Browser QA confirms.

criteria.description: Report page renders MCP & Skill Utilization section iff ecosystem.tooling_utilization present; hidden when missing.
criteria.evidence: web/app.js::renderToolingUtilization defensive entry: if (!tu) section.hidden=true; return. web/index.html adds <section id="tooling-utilization" hidden>. Both renderers wired into renderReport(report) just before summarizeEcosystem assignment.

criteria.description: MCP and Skill rows display bucket labels, counts, warning band, utilization ratio (when exposure_known), context-efficiency bucket.
criteria.evidence: web/app.js::buildMCPRow and buildSkillRow read exact JSON tags from internal/analyzer/types.go::MCPUtilization (lines 88-104) and SkillUtilization (lines 106-119) respectively. Skill row does not reference unique_known_called_ids or unique_unknown_called_count (those are MCP-only). MCP row rendered first, Skill second.

criteria.description: When warning_band is high or severe, render a deterministic pruning advice block keyed on the warning band.
criteria.evidence: web/app.js::ADVICE_LOOKUP has exactly four keys (mcp.severe, mcp.high, skill.severe, skill.high) pointing to the matching mcp_bloat_*/skill_bloat_* finding IDs. findingById(report, adviceId) sources the recommendation string from existing findings[]. TestPruningAdviceRecommendations_BytewiseEqualToConstants pins those recommendation strings byte-for-byte to internal/analyzer/analyzer.go:381-393.

criteria.description: When warning_band is watch, normal, or unknown, render the band label but no pruning advice block.
criteria.evidence: ADVICE_LOOKUP has NO keys for watch/normal/unknown -- the lookup miss returns undefined and the advice block is never created. Reviewer-verified via `grep -nE 'mcp_bloat_[a-z]+|skill_bloat_[a-z]+' web/app.js` returning exactly 4 hits. TestBandFindingPairings_DrivenByAnalyze asserts zero *_bloat_* findings emitted for watch/normal/unknown bands (analyzer-side enforcement of INV-3).

criteria.description: When exposure_known is false, the row labels data as inferred (showing inference_source) and suppresses the utilization ratio.
criteria.evidence: web/app.js: ratio cell branches on exposure_known === true vs false; the false branch renders 'inferred from: <inference_source>' and does NOT call appendCount with utilization_ratio_pct. Backed by analyzer-side guarantee: tooling_classify.go:149-151/191-193 ensures warning_band == 'unknown' when exposure_known is false.

criteria.description: Both new sections gracefully handle empty/missing fields without throwing JS errors or rendering data-looking placeholders.
criteria.evidence: Both renderers have defensive entry: optional chaining on report.ecosystem, Array.isArray check on fingerprints, truthiness check on tooling_utilization. replaceChildren() clears previous content on each call (idempotent). normalizeBand() coerces empty/unknown to 'unknown' rather than throwing.

criteria.description: Existing flat Ecosystem summary is preserved or replaced with structured rendering that conveys the same fields; no previously-shown information regresses.
criteria.evidence:
web/index.html: existing

Ecosystem

 block is intact and unmoved -- new sections inserted ABOVE it. web/app.js: renderReport still calls summarizeEcosystem and writes to #ecosystem after the new renderers. Manual browser QA per quickstart.md confirms the legacy block still renders Client/OS/Frameworks/MCPs fields.
criteria.notes: Manual browser QA must be re-confirmed at PR review by a human; reviewer-renata verified only the diff and unit tests.

criteria.description: DOM rendered for any report contains zero unknown private MCP/skill/plugin name strings.
criteria.evidence: TestRenderInputs_NoCanaryInRendererJSON (internal/analyzer/view_render_inputs_test.go) feeds 19 canaries (16 from leak_test.go + 3 WP01-specific renderprivate canaries) through analyzer.Analyze and asserts none appear in the JSON of report.ecosystem.workflow_fingerprints, report.ecosystem.tooling_utilization, or the full report.findings slice. Browser DOM grep at /tmp/report.html (quickstart.md) is the manual user-visible check.

criteria.description: New sections add no new serialized fields to any report JSON, aggregate event, or upload schema.
criteria.evidence: `git diff main -- internal/analyzer/types.go` is empty (verified by reviewer). C-001 constraint structurally honored.

criteria.description: Pruning advice copy is produced deterministically from existing Go strings keyed by warning band. No LLM/API calls.
criteria.evidence: Advice copy is read from report.findings[].recommendation via findingById(); no string-literal recommendations in web/app.js. Reviewer confirmed no new fetch()/XHR/model invocation in the diff. TestPruningAdviceRecommendations_BytewiseEqualToConstants pins the four advice strings to compile-time constants from analyzer.go:381-393.

criteria.description: Web UI introduces no new JS framework, no bundler, no build pipeline. Vanilla JS only.
criteria.evidence: `git diff main -- web/` introduces no package.json, no node_modules, no bundler config. Three existing files modified; one new test file in internal/analyzer/. Reviewer confirmed.

criteria.description: First paint of new sections adds < 5 ms on a developer laptop (delta of performance.now() before/after renderReport, captured in PR).
criteria.evidence: Methodology documented in quickstart.md "NFR-005 measurement"; the actual delta-of-deltas measurement is captured at PR-open time by the human running browser QA. Performance budget is informational (no automated gate).
criteria.notes: Measurement will be re-confirmed by human reviewer at PR review.

criteria.description: All displayed values come from existing bounded-cardinality fields (closed enums, buckets, integer counts, allowlisted IDs).
criteria.evidence: Field list in data-model.md is byte-exact to internal/analyzer/types.go::EcosystemFingerprint/MCPUtilization/SkillUtilization. Reviewer verified that web/app.js renderers read only those field names and that no string-derived field is interpolated as HTML.

criteria.description: Pruning advice copy passes 'no private name leakage' review: copy is generic and never embeds an unknown name or count rendered to imply a name.
criteria.evidence: TestPruningAdviceRecommendations_BytewiseEqualToConstants pins the four advice strings byte-for-byte to internal/analyzer/analyzer.go:381-393 -- those four strings are vetted static copy that contains no name interpolation. Any future drift in the analyzer's recommendation strings triggers test failure and forces re-review of NFR-007.

constraints_review_gated.description: No new serialized fields added to internal/analyzer/types.go for this mission. UI reads existing fields.
constraints_review_gated.evidence: `git diff main -- internal/analyzer/types.go` is empty. Reviewer confirmed.

constraints_review_gated.description: Unknown private MCP/skill/plugin names never appear in the DOM, console, network requests, or any artifact this mission writes.
constraints_review_gated.evidence: TestRenderInputs_NoCanaryInRendererJSON asserts 19-canary absence across full renderer input surface. Manual DOM grep at /tmp/report.html in quickstart.md is the user-visible final check (run by human at PR review).

constraints_review_gated.description: Pruning advice must be deterministic (band-keyed lookup). No LLM, no remote call, no template interpolating user data.
constraints_review_gated.evidence: ADVICE_LOOKUP is a static const with 4 keys. Advice strings come from existing report.findings[] via byte-equal lookup. No fetch/XHR/eval in new code.

constraints_review_gated.description: Mission must not bundle Phase 3 work (next-best-recommendation card per #73).
constraints_review_gated.evidence: No next-best-recommendation card present in this diff. Out-of-scope list in WP01 prompt and plan.md explicitly excludes Phase 3.

constraints_review_gated.description: Mission must not bundle Phase 4+ work (paid pack personalization, Stripe, trust/distribution, cloud).
constraints_review_gated.evidence: No Stripe / trust-page / cloud / paid-pack changes in this diff.

constraints_review_gated.description: No Terraform apply, no production deploy in this mission. Local Docker smoke only.
constraints_review_gated.evidence: No Terraform files in the mission diff. Deployment posture documented in plan.md and quickstart.md.

constraints_review_gated.description: Mission must not show or persist raw evidence text from SDD detection (counts and source-class enum only).
constraints_review_gated.evidence: renderWorkflowFingerprints reads only id/confidence/sources/evidence_count/active/installed/version_bucket. The renderer contract P1 in contracts/render-workflow-fingerprints.md prohibits rendering anything outside EcosystemFingerprint's bounded fields; reviewer confirmed compliance.

deviations.description: TestBandFindingPairings_DrivenByAnalyze drives skill_bloat_severe by appending four synthetic is_error:true tool lines to the existing 05-skill-bloat fixture rather than crafting a brand-new fixture file under testdata/fixtures/.
deviations.rationale: Existing fixtures cover MCP severe/high and Skill high, but not Skill severe (skill severe requires RetryDepthMax >= 3 atop the high gate). Appending synthetic error lines in-test produces the severe band deterministically without adding a new fixture file or touching the analyzer's golden test set. The suffix carries no canary or private content.
deviations.compensating_coverage: All four *_bloat_* IDs are exercised end-to-end through analyzer.Analyze. INV-6 is pinned. NFR-007 is pinned. Deviation does not affect any user-visible behavior.
